creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 177165
py-seafdav.diff

This is an update to py-seafdav to the most current version, 6.0.3. This update has a bug fix, license change, and an improvement to quota check.

* Updated to 6.0.3
* Added license file

 - Improve quota check.
 - Fix move_file RPC call parameter.
 - Add MIT license.

portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
